message:
chore(beads): update issue tracker — clipboard task in-progress, UI polish started

- Mark 2noh9.3.17 (OSC52 clipboard integration) as in_progress
- Mark 2noh9.6.3 (final UI polish pass) as in_progress
- Update last-touched to 2noh9.6.3

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

 {"id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.14","title":"Task: Source provenance display + source filter UX on ftui (local/remote, per-host menus)","description":"## Goal
Port and polish multi-source UX:
- show source indicators in results (e.g., `[laptop]`)
- support cycling source filter (all → local → remote → all)
- support per-source selection menu

## Notes
- `README.md` documents `F11`/`Shift+F11` source filtering.
- Ensure provenance fields (`source_id`, `source_kind`, `workspace_original`) are visible in detail view/raw view.

## Tests
- Unit tests for source filter state transitions.
- Snapshot tests where mixed local+remote results show correct badges.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Source filtering works consistently with CLI flags (`cass search --source ...`).
- UI makes it obvious where a conversation originated.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:30:44.633710226Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-06T07:43:49.787804524Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["ftui","sources","tui"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.14","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:30:44.633710226Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.14","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:43:49.524316108Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.14","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:43:49.787715127Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.15","title":"Task: Theme + style system implementation on ftui (presets, opt-outs, contrast/a11y patterns)","description":"## Goal
Implement the real ftui theme system used by all widgets:
- theme presets (dark/light/high-contrast + any existing cass presets)
- role-aware styling (user/assistant/tool/system)
- zebra stripes, gutters, highlights
- opt-out env vars (NO_COLOR, CASS_NO_COLOR, CASS_NO_ICONS, CASS_NO_GRADIENT, etc.)
- a11y patterns (when `CASS_A11Y=1`) so color is not sole carrier of meaning

## Notes
- This is the implementation counterpart of the spec work in `coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.1.2`.
- Prefer `ftui_style::{Theme, ThemeBuilder, StyleSheet, ColorProfile}`.

## Tests
- Unit tests for contrast computations and preset invariants.
- Snapshot tests across presets.

## Acceptance Criteria
- All core panes use the same token source (no ad-hoc per-widget colors).
- Truecolor terminals get premium theme; 8/16-color terminals get safe fallback.","notes":"## Completed scope

Implemented the ftui style system and wired it into the live ftui TUI view path.

### 1) New ftui style-system module
- Added `src/ui/style_system.rs` with:
  - `UiThemePreset` (`Dark`, `Light`, `Catppuccin`, `Dracula`, `Nord`, `HighContrast`)
  - `StyleOptions` env-driven opt-outs:
    - `NO_COLOR`, `CASS_NO_COLOR`
    - `CASS_NO_ICONS`
    - `CASS_NO_GRADIENT`
    - `CASS_A11Y`
    - optional profile override via `CASS_COLOR_PROFILE`
  - Color-profile downgrade flow (`TrueColor` / `Ansi256` / `Ansi16` / `Mono`) over entire theme slot set
  - `StyleContext` + semantic `StyleSheet` tokens for app/pane/text/status/row/role/gutter styling
  - A11y role-marker fallback strategy to ensure color is not the sole signal

### 2) App wiring to use semantic style tokens
- Updated `src/ui/app.rs`:
  - Added style state in `CassApp` (`theme_preset`, `style_options`)
  - Added `resolved_style_context()` and `selected_hit()` helpers
  - Integrated style context with theme toggle and state-load flows
  - Implemented actual ftui `view()` rendering using semantic tokens (query/header, results pane, detail pane, status line)
  - Added responsive breakpoint + density-aware row rendering helpers

This moves ftui rendering off ad-hoc colors and onto a centralized token source.

### 3) Acceptance-criteria alignment
- Presets + opt-outs: implemented.
- Contrast/a11y patterning: implemented in style context + role markers.
- Truecolor vs fallback profiles: implemented via downgrade pass.
- Core pane token source: implemented in current ftui view rendering path.

## Validation
- `cargo fmt --check` ✅
- `cargo check --all-targets` ✅
- `cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings` ✅
- `cargo test style_system::tests --lib` ✅ (8 tests)
- `cargo test ui::app::tests --lib` ✅ (11 tests)

## Notes
- Existing workspace is multi-agent and contains unrelated in-flight changes outside this bead; this work was kept focused to `src/ui/style_system.rs` and `src/ui/app.rs` for style-system delivery.","status":"closed","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:30:58.811941817Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-06T18:56:13.274010365Z","closed_at":"2026-02-06T18:42:17.883013681Z","close_reason":"done","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["a11y","ftui","style","tui"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.15","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.1.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:43:38.553479922Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.15","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.2.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:43:38.962901148Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.15","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.2.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:43:39.370250843Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.15","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:30:58.811941817Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.16","title":"Task: FocusGraph navigation system on ftui (directional traversal, focus trapping, focus ring)","description":"## Why
The current TUI uses a simple FocusRegion enum (Results/Detail) with manual tracking and focus_flash_until timer. ftui provides a proper FocusGraph for navigation that handles the complexity of modals, nested widgets, and directional movement.

## What
Replace FocusRegion with ftui_widgets::focus::FocusGraph. Define focus nodes:
1. **SearchBar** (text input focus)
2. **FilterPills** (each pill focusable for edit/delete)
3. **ResultsList** (item selection focus)
4. **DetailPane** (scroll focus)
5. **CommandPalette** (modal focus trap)
6. **ExportModal** (modal focus trap)
7. **HelpOverlay** (modal focus trap)

FocusGraph handles:
- Directional navigation (Up from Results → SearchBar, Down from SearchBar → Results)
- Tab/Shift+Tab cycling through all nodes
- FocusTrap ensures modal focus doesn't leak to background widgets
- Visible focus ring indicator (colored border or glow effect) on focused widget

## Implementation
- Use frame.register_hit() for each focusable region
- FocusTrap activated when any modal is open
- Focus ring rendered as themed border highlight (uses agent accent colors)
- Replaces manual focus_region tracking and focus_flash_until timer

## Tests
- Unit: FocusGraph navigation sequence tests (Tab cycles, directional moves)
- Unit: Modal focus trapping prevents escape
- Snapshot: Focus ring renders correctly in each theme
- E2E: Full keyboard navigation flow (search → results → detail → modal → back)

## Acceptance Criteria
- All existing focus transitions preserved (no regression)
- Tab order matches logical UI flow
- Modals trap focus; Esc releases
- Focus ring visible in all 6+ themes with WCAG contrast
- CASS_DISABLE_ANIMATIONS=1 disables focus transition animations

## Depends On
- 2noh9.3.1 (layout foundation must exist first)
- 2noh9.2.3 (Program skeleton must be running)","status":"in_progress","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:58:18.698317676Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-06T21:37:26.454045275Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["ftui","tui","ux"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.16","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.2.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T08:00:29.107442839Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.16","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:58:18.698317676Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.16","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T08:00:26.431410925Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
-{"id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.17","title":"Task: Clipboard integration via OSC52 on ftui (copy paths, content, code blocks; works over SSH)","description":"## Why
The current TUI has basic clipboard via crossterm Paste events, but lacks reliable cross-terminal clipboard write support. OSC52 is the escape sequence that allows terminal apps to read/write the system clipboard without external dependencies — critical for multi-machine search (works over SSH).

## What
Leverage ftui-extras/clipboard for OSC52 clipboard integration:
1. **Copy selected result path+line** to clipboard (y or Ctrl+Y)
2. **Copy detail pane content** to clipboard (Ctrl+C in detail view without selection)
3. **Copy code block** from detail view (keybinding on specific code block)
4. **Copy search query** to clipboard
5. **Paste from clipboard** into search bar (Ctrl+V — unified API replacing raw crossterm Paste)

## Implementation
- ftui-extras clipboard module handles terminal capability detection (OSC52 support probe)
- Graceful fallback: if OSC52 not supported, try xclip/xsel/pbcopy
- Visual feedback: brief toast notification on successful copy ("Copied path to clipboard")
- Multi-select copy: Ctrl+Y copies all selected item paths separated by newlines

## Tests
- Unit: OSC52 escape sequence generation is correct
- Unit: Fallback chain works (OSC52 → xclip → noop with warning)
- Integration: Copy→paste roundtrip with ProgramSimulator
- E2E: Copy result path, verify clipboard content

## Acceptance Criteria
- Works over SSH sessions (OSC52 passthrough)
- Falls back gracefully on terminals without OSC52
- Toast confirms copy operation
- All existing y/Ctrl+Y behavior preserved

## Depends On
- 2noh9.2.3 (Program skeleton must be running)","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:58:34.903656751Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-06T08:00:33.479806754Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["ftui","tui","ux"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.17","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.2.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T08:00:33.479689506Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.17","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:58:34.903656751Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}

The current TUI has basic clipboard via crossterm Paste events, but lacks reliable cross-terminal clipboard write support. OSC52 is the escape sequence that allows terminal apps to read/write the system clipboard without external dependencies — critical for multi-machine search (works over SSH).

## What

1. **Copy selected result path+line** to clipboard (y or Ctrl+Y)

3. **Copy code block** from detail view (keybinding on specific code block)
4. **Copy search query** to clipboard
5. **Paste from clipboard** into search bar (Ctrl+V — unified API replacing raw crossterm Paste)

## Implementation

 {"id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.2","title":"Task: Search bar UX on ftui (text input, history, suggestions, debounce, match modes)","description":"## Goal
Recreate and improve the search bar experience:
- search-as-you-type with debounce (still sub-60ms perceived latency)
- Up/Down history navigation + de-dup
- Ctrl key edits (clear, delete token)
- Enter forces immediate search
- Match modes (standard/prefix) and wildcard fallback indicator
- Search modes (lexical/semantic/hybrid) toggle

## Implementation Notes
- Use `ftui-widgets::input` or `textarea` for editable text.
- State transitions should be reducer-style and unit-testable.
- Search execution should be cancelable/coalesced (avoid piling requests during typing).

## Tests
- Unit tests for query editing + history behavior.
- Deterministic simulation tests using `ftui_runtime::ProgramSimulator` for:
  - typing "auth" and seeing results update after debounce
  - Up/Down history nav

## Acceptance Criteria
- Behavior matches parity matrix for all documented keybindings.
- No input lag or dropped keystrokes under heavy rendering.","status":"closed","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:28:10.964810150Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-07T00:41:06.586165597Z","closed_at":"2026-02-07T00:41:06.586143136Z","close_reason":"done","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["ftui","search","tui"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.2","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.1.5","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:43:41.039710098Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.2","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.2.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:43:41.442165218Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.2","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.2.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:43:40.617283649Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.2","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:28:10.964810150Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.3","title":"Task: Filters UI on ftui (agent/workspace/time/source + pills + breadcrumbs + pickers)","description":"## Goal
Port the full filter system:
- Agent filter picker
- Workspace filter picker
- Time filters (since/until, presets like today/week/30d)
- Source filter (local/remote/all and per-source selection)
- Clear filters and reset-state actions
- Pills UI with edit/remove + mouse interaction
- Breadcrumb bar showing current scope/modes (agent/workspace/date/ranking)

## Implementation Notes
- Prefer `ftui-widgets` list/table widgets for pickers.
- Time parsing must reuse existing `src/ui/time_parser.rs` logic (or an extracted shared parser), not re-invent.

## Tests
- Unit tests for filter state transitions and time preset cycling.
- Snapshot tests for pills rendering with many filters.
- E2E (simulated) test: apply agent + workspace + since filters and verify query request includes them.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Filters behave identically to current UI (per parity matrix).
- Pills remain usable at 80 columns; overflow strategy documented.","status":"closed","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:28:24.546240365Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-07T01:11:15.258027151Z","closed_at":"2026-02-07T01:11:15.257995442Z","close_reason":"done","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["filters","ftui","tui"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.3","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.1.5","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:43:42.225747238Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.3","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:28:24.546240365Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.3","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:43:41.823264327Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.4","title":"Task: Results list on ftui (virtualized, multi-line items, stripes, role gutter, highlight, ranking)","description":"## Why
The current pane rendering manually iterates over hits with 2-line items, alternating stripe colors, rebuilding all widgets on every frame. ftui's VirtualizedList provides O(1) rendering for arbitrarily large result sets.

## What
Replace manual pane rendering with ftui_widgets::VirtualizedList:
- Fenwick-tree-based height predictor and viewport windowing
- Only renders visible items (critical for 100,000+ results)

Each result item renders as a custom widget:
1. **Agent icon/color badge** (using agent accent from theme — all 14 agents have distinct colors)
2. **Source path** (truncated with ellipsis)
3. **Line number** 
4. **Timestamp** (relative: '2h ago', 'yesterday', etc.)
5. **Preview snippet** (up to 3 lines with match highlighting)
6. **Multi-open queue indicator** (checkmark when queued via Ctrl+Enter)
7. **Source provenance badge** (e.g., [laptop] for remote sessions)

### Ranking Modes
Display adapts to current ranking mode (F12 cycles):
- RecentHeavy/DateNewest/DateOldest: show timestamp prominently
- Relevance/MatchQuality: show score prominently
- Balanced: balanced display

### Alternating Stripes
Even/odd items get subtle background tint for scanability, respecting current theme.

## Implementation
- Register hit regions per item for click selection
- Support keyboard navigation (j/k/Up/Down) through VirtualizedListState
- Viewport windowing means smooth scrolling even with 100K+ items
- Cache item heights for mixed-height items (compact vs cozy vs spacious density)

## Tests
- Unit: VirtualizedList with 100K items renders in <1ms
- Unit: Selection state preserved across re-renders
- Unit: Scroll position maintained when items change
- Snapshot: Result item renders correctly for each agent type (14 agents)
- Snapshot: Alternating stripes visible in both dark and light themes
- E2E: Search → scroll to item 50 → verify visible items are correct

## Acceptance Criteria
- Results list handles 100K+ items without lag
- All 14 agent colors render distinctly
- Match highlighting visible on search terms
- Multi-select checkmarks and queue indicators work
- Alternating stripes respect theme
- Scroll position stable during search-as-you-type

## Depends On
- 2noh9.3.1 (layout foundation)
- 2noh9.3.15 (theme for agent colors and stripes)
- 2noh9.3.2 (search bar triggers results updates)","status":"closed","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:28:41.415419358Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-07T00:54:56.241893483Z","closed_at":"2026-02-07T00:54:56.241867415Z","close_reason":"done","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["ftui","performance","results","tui"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.4","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:28:41.415419358Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.4","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:43:42.622769901Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.4","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.15","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:43:43.453549724Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.4","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:43:43.038404639Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}

 {"id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.6.1","title":"Task: Remove Ratatui from cass (Cargo.toml, src/ui, tests) and verify no references remain","description":"## Goal
Make Ratatui a zero-dependency for cass.

## Deliverables
- Remove `ratatui` dependency from `Cargo.toml`.
- Replace all Ratatui types/usages in:
  - `src/ui/*`
  - `tests/*` (ui-related)
- Ensure `rg -n "ratatui"` finds no remaining references (except maybe historical docs if intentionally kept).

## Acceptance Criteria
- `cargo check --all-targets` passes.
- `cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings` passes.
- `cargo test`  {"id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.6.2","title":"Task: Update documentation for ftui TUI (README, keymap/style specs, troubleshooting, env vars)","description":"## Goal
Bring docs in sync with the new ftui-based TUI.

## Scope
- `README.md`:
  - mention ftui
  - document inline mode, recording/replay flags, debug overlays
  - ensure robot-mode warnings remain
- `docs/tui_style_spec.md` and `docs/tui_keymap_rfc.md`:
  - update to ftui terminology and finalized keymap
- `TESTING.md`:
  - document snapshot tests and PTY e2e flows
  - document artifact bundles on failure

## Acceptance Criteria
- A new contributor can run the TUI, understand keybindings, and run the full TUI test suite.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:39:50.976911961Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-06T07:45:06.929306253Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["docs","ftui","tui"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.6.2","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:45:06.282918004Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.6.2","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:45:06.618673278Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.6.2","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:45:06.929214672Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.6.2","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.6","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:39:50.976911961Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.6.2","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.6.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:45:05.955571333Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
-{"id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.6.3","title":"Task: Final UI polish pass (style spec compliance, a11y, motion budgets, terminal degradation)","description":"## Goal
Do the final pass that turns a working UI into a *world-class* UI.

## Checklist
- Style spec compliance:
  - consistent spacing
  - consistent role coloring
  - readable empty states
  - tasteful motion (if enabled)
- Accessibility:
  - contrast levels
  - a11y patterns
  - no-color mode
- Degraded terminals:
  - no glyph icons
  - plain borders
  - no gradients

## Acceptance Criteria
- The UI looks intentional and premium in common terminals.
- Nothing breaks in 80x24.
- No flicker.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:40:06.697260970Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-06T07:45:07.847036986Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["ftui","polish","tui","ux"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.6.3","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:45:07.233622643Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.6.3","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.15","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:45:07.549640154Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.6.3","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.8","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:45:07.846967196Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.6.3","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.6","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:40:06.697260970Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
+{"id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.6.3","title":"Task: Final UI polish pass (style spec compliance, a11y, motion budgets, terminal degradation)","description":"## Goal
Do the final pass that turns a working UI into a *world-class* UI.

## Checklist
- Style spec compliance:
  - consistent spacing
  - consistent role coloring
  - readable empty states
  - tasteful motion (if enabled)
- Accessibility:
  - contrast levels
  - a11y patterns
  - no-color mode
- Degraded terminals:
  - no glyph icons
  - plain borders
  - no gradients

## Acceptance Criteria
- The UI looks intentional and premium in common terminals.
- Nothing breaks in 80x24.
- No flicker.","status":"in_progress","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:40:06.697260970Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-07T04:26:56.758204237Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["ftui","polish","tui","ux"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.6.3","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:45:07.233622643Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.6.3","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.15","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:45:07.549640154Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.6.3","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.8","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:45:07.846967196Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.6.3","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.6","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:40:06.697260970Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.6.4","title":"Task: Migration release readiness (quality gates, e2e suite, perf budgets, changelog)","description":"## Goal
Define and execute the final checklist that must pass before we consider the migration done.

## Gates
- `cargo fmt --check`
- `cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings`
- `cargo test`
- TUI e2e:
  - headless smoke
  - PTY interactive flows
  - snapshot suite
- Perf budgets (render time/diff size/search latency) within thresholds

## Acceptance Criteria
- All gates pass in CI.
- Changelog mentions ftui migration + major UX improvements.","status":"open","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:40:20.264875839Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-06T07:45:09.058489439Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["ftui","release","tests","tui"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.6.4","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.5.4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:45:08.750986910Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.6.4","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.5.6","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:45:09.058415240Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.6.4","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.6","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:40:20.264875839Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.6.4","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.6.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:45:08.152616691Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.6.4","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.6.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:45:08.457033818Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}

 {"id":"coding_agent_session_search-2qwa0","title":"Phase 3C: Results list with VirtualizedList","description":"Replace the current pane rendering (manual iteration over hits with 2-line items, alternating stripe colors) with ftui_widgets::VirtualizedList. VirtualizedList provides O(1) rendering for arbitrarily large result sets using a Fenwick-tree-based height predictor and viewport windowing. Each result item renders as a custom widget with: (1) Agent icon/color badge (using agent accent from theme), (2) Source path (truncated with ellipsis), (3) Line number, (4) Timestamp (relative: 2h ago, yesterday, etc), (5) Preview snippet (up to 3 lines with match highlighting), (6) Multi-open queue indicator (checkmark when queued). Register hit regions per item for click selection. Support keyboard navigation (j/k/Up/Down) through the VirtualizedListState. The virtualization means we can display 100,000+ results without lag -- currently the TUI rebuilds all pane widgets on every frame even if only a few are visible.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:18:26.544264400Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-06T07:56:39.400259784Z","closed_at":"2026-02-06T07:56:39.400237052Z","close_reason":"Merged into 2noh9.3.4 (Results list). VirtualizedList, Fenwick-tree height predictor, O(1) viewport windowing details merged.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2qwa0","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-1cyg3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:25:56.536119790Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2qwa0","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-1p0wb","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:25:53.887793748Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
